title: Tome V Act 1: The First Cloak

story.text:
# 📖 Tome V Act 1: The First Cloak
**act** · mage · narrative

Pallia at the loom; the reader does not just walk the lattice, the reader makes tools on it.
> *The reader does not just walk the lattice. The reader makes tools on it.*
